description: Community extensions and presets that speckit-pro auto-installs on /speckit-pro:install and offers version bumps for on /speckit-pro:upgrade. Resolution: latest GitHub Release tag at install time, falling back to latest git tag if no Release exists. Never main. See speckit-pro/skills/speckit-coach/references/presets-extensions-guide.md for the rationale.

entries.description: Post-implementation code review with specialized agents for code quality, comments, tests, error handling, type design, and simplification.
Post-implementation quality gate that validates implemented code against specification artifacts.
Detect phantom completions: tasks marked [X] in tasks.md with no real implementation.
Post-implementation quality gate that reviews changes, fixes small issues (scout rule), creates tasks for medium issues, and generates analysis for large issues.
Post-implementation retrospective with spec adherence scoring, drift analysis, and human-gated spec updates.
Upgrades /speckit.clarify and /speckit.checklist on Claude Code from Markdown-table prompts to the native AskUserQuestion picker, with a recommended option and reasoning on every question.
